name: Auto Anomaly Flag on NBFC record when comparison metrics breach thresholds

thresholds_chosen_autonomously.rationale: User-supplied via /nbfc loop E-066 --auto-approve-schema; supersedes BRD-extract heuristic thresholds (delinquency_pct >= 7.0/5.0, avg_cds, recovery_rate_pct < 60/70) because BRD did not quantify red/amber and avg_dpd is a more directly available signal on nbfc_loans than avg_cds.

verification.type_check: 0 new errors (2 pre-existing on apoorv-claude baseline: chromium types + E-005 test fixture)
verification.tests_run: n/a (no e2e harness invocation in this loop; AC verification via code-path review against evaluator unit semantics)
